category_sources: Official GitHub README at https://github.com/antvis/mcp-server-chart describes visualization MCP and skills using AntV.
source_facts.description says this MCP server provides 25+ AntV charts for visualization, generation, and analysis.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub repository and README use mcp-server-chart: https://github.com/antvis/mcp-server-chart
docs_sources: No separate official docs site found; official GitHub README contains installation, usage, and development documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official GitHub repository URL.
tags_sources: Official GitHub README topics include visualization, skills, MCP, AntV, and MCP server.
source_facts.description identifies AntV charts, visualization, generation, and analysis.
